criteria.name: feedback timing has no leakage violations
same current input supports opposite labels
sign_persistence no longer dominates
criteria.note: A memory-pressure task cannot be solved by the reflex baseline.

criteria.name: oracle context solves the task
criteria.note: Proves the task is solvable with the missing context state.

criteria.name: stream context memory solves the task
criteria.note: Proves a simple memory of prior context is sufficient.

criteria.name: context memory beats sign persistence
criteria.note: The task must reward remembered context over current-signal reflexes.

criteria.name: shuffled/reset/wrong memory controls fail
criteria.note: The benefit must depend on correct memory, not generic capacity.

tier_summary.claim_boundary: Task-validation evidence only; it proves memory pressure, not CRA memory performance.

summary.claim_boundary: Task-validation evidence only; it proves memory pressure, not CRA memory performance.
